specific_location: Drainage ditch behind 1513 Wildwood Ct, Fort Collins
description: Warbler size and profile. Mostly yellow on undersides, olive-brown back and wings that looked brown in areas where light was dim and olive only in better lit areas. Grayish hood was incomplete on underside - throat was dull yellow. White arcs around eyes were thin and incomplete. Bird may have chipped but can't be sure; other warblers including MacGillivray's warbler were present. At least one sharp warbler chip was heard that was more emphatic than nearby Wilson's Warblers, which were also chipping on occasion.
